title: Athletes shine
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - About 600 school athletes took part in the Knysna, Plett and Sedgefield three-districts sports meeting held at Wittedrift High School on Saturday 8 February - the first time in 27 years that such a meeting was held there.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - About 600 school athletes took part in the Knysna, Plett and Sedgefield three-districts sports meeting held at Wittedrift High School on Saturday 8 February - the first time in 27 years that such a meeting was held there."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Joanita Arends, chairperson of Knysna, Plett and Sedgefield School Sports (KPSSS) described the event, hosted by Wittedrift Primary and Greenwood Bay College, as \"highly successful\".","html":"Joanita Arends, chairperson of Knysna, Plett and Sedgefield School Sports (KPSSS) described the event, hosted by Wittedrift Primary and Greenwood Bay College, as \"highly successful\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Good teamwork'","html":"'Good teamwork'"},{"type":"blockquote","text":"She lauded the \"very good teamwork\" from officials and coaches and thanked Wittedrift High for making its sports fields available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She was also grateful for the contributions made by the community, and said that \"everything was well planned and organised\".","html":"She was also grateful for the contributions made by the community, and said that \"everything was well planned and organised\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The last time such an athletics competition was held there was in 1998. Arends also thanked the Red Cross, Bitou law enforcement and Plett Security for the assistance they provided.","html":"The last time such an athletics competition was held there was in 1998. Arends also thanked the Red Cross, Bitou law enforcement and Plett Security for the assistance they provided."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"About 200 athletes qualified at the meeting to take part in the Eden Championships on 22 February in Oudtshoorn at the De Jager Sports Complex."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Outstanding achievements'","html":"'Outstanding achievements'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna will be send 100 athletes, Plett 80 and Sedgefield 20, between the ages of 7 and 13.","html":"Knysna will be send 100 athletes, Plett 80 and Sedgefield 20, between the ages of 7 and 13."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Junior Kamoetoe of Hornlee Primary clears a hurdle in a 75m hurdles event.","html":"Junior Kamoetoe of Hornlee Primary clears a hurdle in a 75m hurdles event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Arends said there were some \"outstanding achievements\" on the Saturday.","html":"Arends said there were some \"outstanding achievements\" on the Saturday."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I hope to see the record-breakers and more of our athletes in the Eden team. Good luck to all. I'm super proud,\" she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Those athletes between the ages of 10 and 13 who qualify at the Eden Championships will go on to participate in the Western Cape Championships, to be held on 8 March in Paarl at the Dal Josafat Stadium.","html":"Those athletes between the ages of 10 and 13 who qualify at the Eden Championships will go on to participate in the Western Cape Championships, to be held on 8 March in Paarl at the Dal Josafat Stadium."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Amore Roelph and Jesmine Prins of Hornlee Primary and Zani van der Vyver in a 75m u13 hurdles event.","html":"Amore Roelph and Jesmine Prins of Hornlee Primary and Zani van der Vyver in a 75m u13 hurdles event."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Records broken this past Saturday:","html":"Records broken this past Saturday:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Jade Gelant (Knysna) Girls' u12 - high jump; Caleb Muller (Knysna) Boys' u9 - high jump; Mohammed Tanje (Plett) Boys' u11 - high jump; Everencia Goliath (Knysna) Girls' u11 - 1 200m; Tamia Toll (Plett) Girls' u8 - 800m; Skyler Davids (Plett) Girls' u9 - 1 200m; Raven Davids (Plett) Girls' u13 - 200m; and Hdeaza Andrews (Plett) Girls' u8 - 60m.","html":"Jade Gelant (Knysna) Girls' u12 - high jump; Caleb Muller (Knysna) Boys' u9 - high jump; Mohammed Tanje (Plett) Boys' u11 - high jump; Everencia Goliath (Knysna) Girls' u11 - 1 200m; Tamia Toll (Plett) Girls' u8 - 800m; Skyler Davids (Plett) Girls' u9 - 1 200m; Raven Davids (Plett) Girls' u13 - 200m; and Hdeaza Andrews (Plett) Girls' u8 - 60m."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
